ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "npi" TEXT /* National Provider Identifier (NPI) of the provider */,
  "dea" TEXT /* Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA) number of the provider */,
  "specialty_concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main or most often exerted specialty of the provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider record was last updated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Primary address of the provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary contact number of the provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Primary email address of the provider */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the provider */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the provider */,
  "medical_school" TEXT /* Name of the medical school the provider attended */,
  "year_of_graduation" INTEGER /* Year the provider graduated from medical school */,
  "primary_facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary facility where the provider practices */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, inactive, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_providers_specialty_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_concept_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specialties" (
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialty */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the specialty record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the specialty record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the specialty is currently active */,
  "required_certifications" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of required certifications for the specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation record */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare facility */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the affiliation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the affiliation (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the affiliation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the affiliation record was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the provider at the facility */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the provider's primary affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affiliations_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affiliations_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare facility */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the healthcare facility is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the healthcare facility is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the healthcare facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the healthcare facility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility record was last updated */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the healthcare facility */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary contact number of the healthcare facility */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the healthcare facility */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the facility is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credentials" (
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credential record */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "credential_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credential type */,
  "issuing_authority" TEXT /* Issuing authority of the credential */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the credential was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the credential expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the credential (e.g., active, expired, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credential record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credential record was last updated */,
  "credential_number" TEXT /* Unique credential number */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the credential is due for renewal */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the credential is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credential_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credentials_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credentials_credential_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("credential_type_id") REFERENCES credential_types ("credential_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credential_types" (
  "credential_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credential type */,
  "credential_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the credential type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the credential type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credential type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credential type record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the credential type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credential_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR staff, medical director, compliance officer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider record accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the provider record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the provider record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
